mapper.insert: INSERT INTO memory_item (session_id, content, embedding, importance, tags, source_msg_ids, metadata) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{content}, #{embedding}::vector, #{importance}, #{tags,jdbcType=ARRAY,typeHandler=com.ai.agent.infrastructure.persistent.handler.StringArrayTypeHandler}, #{sourceMsgIds,jdbcType=ARRAY,typeHandler=com.ai.agent.infrastructure.persistent.handler.LongArrayTypeHandler}, #{metadata,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.ai.agent.infrastructure.persistent.handler.JsonbTypeHandler})

INSERT INTO memory_item (session_id, content, embedding, importance, tags, source_msg_ids, metadata) VALUES
(#{item.sessionId}, #{item.content}, #{item.embedding}::vector, #{item.importance}, #{item.tags,jdbcType=ARRAY,typeHandler=com.ai.agent.infrastructure.persistent.handler.StringArrayTypeHandler}, #{item.sourceMsgIds,jdbcType=ARRAY,typeHandler=com.ai.agent.infrastructure.persistent.handler.LongArrayTypeHandler}, #{item.metadata,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.ai.agent.infrastructure.persistent.handler.JsonbTypeHandler})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, content, importance, tags, source_msg_ids, created_at, metadata, 1 - (embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector) AS score FROM memory_item WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector LIMIT #{topK}

SELECT id, session_id, content, importance, tags, source_msg_ids, created_at, metadata FROM memory_item WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND tags @> ARRAY['summary']::TEXT[] ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, session_id, content, importance, tags, source_msg_ids, created_at, metadata FROM memory_item WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
